name: Mindless
description: Cannot perform actions requiring a mind. Immune to mental effects and fear.

name: Undead
description: Animated by void energy. Harmed by vitality, healed by void.

name: Construct
description: Built, not born. Immune to bleed, disease, poison, death effects, healing, mental.

name: Animal
description: Non-humanoid creature of relatively low intelligence.

name: Dragon
description: Draconic nature. Subject to Dragonslayer effects.

name: Humanoid
description: Generally human shape. Affected by effects that target humanoids.

name: Beast
description: Animalistic intelligence and instincts.

name: Swarm
description: Mass of tiny creatures acting as one. Immune to grabbed, prone, restrained.

name: Troop
description: Large formation acting as one creature with segment-based HP thresholds.

name: Incorporeal
description: No physical form. Immune to all physical damage.

name: Aquatic
description: Breathes water. Suffocates in air unless noted.

name: Amphibious
description: Can breathe both air and water.

name: Ooze
description: Amorphous. Immune to critical hits, prone, grabbed, restrained.

name: Plant
description: Immune to mental effects.

name: Fungus
description: Immune to mental effects.

name: Fiend
description: Native to the planes of evil.

name: Celestial
description: Native to the planes of good.

name: Elemental
description: Composed of elemental matter.

name: Unholy
description: Aligned with unholy power. Takes extra damage from holy effects.

name: Holy
description: Aligned with holy power. Takes extra damage from unholy effects.

name: Poison
description: This effect involves a poison.

name: Fear
description: This effect causes fear.

name: Emotion
description: Targets emotions. Mindless creatures are immune.

name: Mental
description: Targets the mind. Mindless creatures and constructs are immune.

name: Death
description: Can cause death. Undead and constructs are typically immune.

name: Disease
description: Involves a disease. Constructs and undead are typically immune.

name: Curse
description: Persistent magical effect.

name: Incapacitation
description: Effect is reduced by one step if the target is a higher level than the source.

name: Concentration
description: Requires mental focus.

name: Flourish
description: Can only be used once per turn.

name: Press
description: Can only be used if you have already made an attack this turn.

name: Open
description: Can only be used as your first action on your turn.

name: Stance
description: Entering this stance replaces any other stance you are in.

name: Polymorph
description: Transforms the target's body.

name: Teleportation
description: Moves the creature instantaneously.

name: Auditory
description: Effect requires hearing. Deaf creatures are unaffected.

name: Visual
description: Effect requires sight. Blind creatures are unaffected.

name: Agile
description: MAP penalty is -4/-8 instead of -5/-10.

name: Deadly
description: On a critical hit, add one extra damage die.

name: Disarm
description: Can use this weapon to Disarm with Athletics even without a free hand.

name: Fatal
description: On a critical hit, the weapon's damage die changes to the listed size.

name: Finesse
description: Can use Dexterity instead of Strength on attack rolls.

name: Forceful
description: Builds momentum with successive hits.

name: Free-Hand
description: Uses one hand but leaves the other free.

name: Grapple
description: Can use this weapon to Grapple with Athletics even without a free hand.

name: Nonlethal
description: Damage from this weapon is nonlethal unless you choose otherwise.

name: Parry
description: Spend one action to gain +1 circumstance bonus to AC until your next turn.

name: Propulsive
description: Add half Strength modifier to damage with this ranged weapon.

name: Ranged Trip
description: Can use this weapon to Trip at range with Athletics.

name: Reach
description: This weapon can attack targets up to 10 feet away.

name: Shove
description: Can use this weapon to Shove with Athletics even without a free hand.

name: Sweep
description: Gain +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls if you attacked a different target this turn.

name: Thrown
description: Can throw this weapon as a ranged attack.

name: Topple
description: If this Strike hits and deals damage, attempt a free Trip against the target.

name: Trip
description: Can use this weapon to Trip with Athletics even without a free hand.

name: Twin
description: Next attack with this weapon type before end of your turn gains +1 circumstance bonus to damage.

name: Two-Hand
description: Can be wielded with two hands, changing its damage die.

name: Unarmed
description: This attack is an unarmed attack.

name: Versatile
description: This weapon can deal a different damage type.

name: Volley
description: Attacking within the listed range applies a -2 penalty to the attack roll.
